pr-evidence/current-benchmark-results-in.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer approved the final PR #511 diff with no findings, including the current benchmark index and this self-contained PR-evidence sidecar.
verification: poetry run ruff check tests/test_project_governance.py -> unavailable because ruff is not installed in the Poetry environment
new benchmark docs token-pattern scan returned no Databricks PAT matches

PYTHONPATH=src poetry run python -m document_kv_cache.pr_evidence --validate-directory pr-evidence/current-benchmark-results-index --output-json pr-evidence/current-benchmark-results-index/pr-evidence-validation.json -> ok=true
what_changed: Added benchmarks/current/README.md as the concise human-facing index for the current Cachet Databricks benchmark results.
Updated README.md, benchmarks/README.md, docs/README.md, and docs/v1-requirements-matrix.md so readers start with benchmarks/current/ before drilling into standalone dated report folders.
Extended project-governance tests to pin the current benchmark index, standalone folder links, and the boundary that pr-evidence/ is PR validation rather than benchmark output.
pr-evidence/current-benchmark-results-in.why: Benchmark results should be easy to inspect without treating the large machine-readable pr-evidence/ tree as the human benchmark report surface.
